intro: Bulbophyllum sarcophylloides, also known as the 'ghost orchid', is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and other diseases. The bioactive constituents of Bulbophyllum sarcophylloides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
